summary: Iteration 76: Tested Landing V2 route swap, Audio Pre-Approval pipeline feature, and 3D Avatar photo reference fix. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend verified Landing V2 displays correctly at '/' route with hero text 'Your agents. Your campaigns. Every channel.'

details: ✓ approve-audio endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent pipeline)
✓ approve-audio returns 404 for non-existent pipeline (valid UUID)
✓ PipelineView has purple theme for audio approval
✓ Landing V2 hero text 'Your agents. Your campaigns. Every channel.' displayed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested 3 new features: (1) Landing V2 now served at '/' route - verified App.js routes to LandingV2 component with hero text 'Your agents. Your campaigns. Every channel.', (2) Audio Pre-Approval pipeline feature - approve-audio endpoint exists at POST /api/campaigns/pipeline/{id}/approve-audio, StepCard has AudioApprovalPanel with data-testids (audio-approval-panel, approve-audio-btn, reject-audio-btn), PipelineView has waiting_audio_approval status with purple theme, engine.py pauses marcos_video at waiting_audio_approval and has _continue_video_after_approval function, (3) 3D Avatar photo reference fix - generate_avatar_from_prompt now uses _gemini_edit_image instead of LlmChat when reference_photo_url is provided. Key data-testids: audio-approval-panel, approve-audio-btn, reject-audio-btn, audio-feedback-input. Note: Audio approval panel only visible when pipeline is in waiting_audio_approval status.
